title: Trolley Case and Act Utilitarianism
description: Use the trolley case to test act utilitarianism against deontological constraints.

steps.text: A trolley is heading toward five people. You can divert it to a track where it will kill one.

steps.prompt: Is it permissible to divert the trolley?

steps.text: Consider whether maximizing welfare supports your judgment.
Act utilitarianism evaluates each act by whether it maximizes the good.

steps.notes: Check coherence between your judgment and the act utilitarian principle.

steps.text: Introduce the constraint against killing and see if it conflicts with your judgment.

steps.prompt: Which commitment would you revise to improve coherence?
